hooks.label: ai-gains
hooks.command: DATA=$(cat); SESSION_ID=$(echo "$DATA" | jq -r '.session_id'); TS=$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ); AUTHOR=$(git config user.email 2>/dev/null | tr -d '\n'); AUTHOR="${AUTHOR:-unknown}"; mkdir -p .ai-gains; jq -n --arg id "$SESSION_ID" --arg t "$TS" --arg author "$AUTHOR" '{session_id: $id, start_time: $t, author: $author}' > ".ai-gains/${SESSION_ID}.json"

hooks.label: ai-gains
hooks.command: DATA=$(cat); SESSION_ID=$(echo "$DATA" | jq -r '.session_id'); echo "Session ID: $SESSION_ID. IMPORTANT: In your final response, remind the user to update the ai-gains session log (the /ai-gains skill)."

hooks.label: ai-gains
hooks.command: DATA=$(cat); SESSION_ID=$(echo "$DATA" | jq -r '.session_id'); FILE=".ai-gains/${SESSION_ID}.json"; TS=$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ); if [ -f "$FILE" ]; then tmp=$(mktemp); jq --arg t "$TS" '.end_time = $t' "$FILE" > "$tmp" && mv "$tmp" "$FILE"; fi
